---
title: "Season Simulations"
subtitle: "Updated at the end of Round 17"
format: html
execute:
    echo: false
    code-tools: true
engine: jupyter
jupyter: python3
page-layout: custom
resources: assets/clubicons
---

```{python}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
from reactable import embed_css, Column, ColGroup
from _tables import table_card, team_cell, blank_if_zero, gradient_fill
import pandas as pd

embed_css()
df = pd.read_csv("data/Simulations/blog_summary_sims.csv", index_col=0)
lad_df = pd.read_csv("data/Simulations/blog_ladder_distribution.csv",index_col = 0)

ladder_pos_cols = ['Top 4',"Top 6","Top 10","Spooners"]
finals_cols = [
    "Premiers","Runner up","Prelim","Semi Final","Elim Final","Wildcard"
]
pos_cols = [f"{i}" for i in range(1,19)]

df.rename(columns={
    "Avg_Wins": "Exp Wins",
    "Avg_Ladder_Position": "Exp Ladder",
}, inplace=True)

GROUP_BORDER = "2px solid #cccccc"
SIM_PALETTE = ('#ffffff', '#F1F6DD', '#e8f3c3')

sim_columns = {
    "Team": Column(cell=team_cell(), style={"font-weight": "bold"}),
    "Exp Wins": Column(width=120, align="center"),
    "Exp Ladder": Column(width=150, align="center"),
    **{c: Column(
           cell=blank_if_zero(digits=2, suffix="%"), align="center",
           style=gradient_fill(df, palette=SIM_PALETTE, extra={"border-left": GROUP_BORDER} if c == ladder_pos_cols[0] else None),
       ) for c in ladder_pos_cols},
    **{c: Column(
           cell=blank_if_zero(digits=2, suffix="%"), align="center",
           style=gradient_fill(df, palette=SIM_PALETTE, extra={"border-left": GROUP_BORDER} if c == finals_cols[0] else None),
       ) for c in finals_cols},
}

sim_column_groups = [
    ColGroup(name="Ladder Position Probabilities", columns=ladder_pos_cols),
    ColGroup(name="Finals Outcome Probabilities", columns=finals_cols),
]

ladder_columns = {
    "Team": Column(cell=team_cell(), style={"font-weight": "bold"}, width=120),
    **{c: Column(
           cell=blank_if_zero(digits=2, suffix="%"), align="center", width=95.5,
           style=gradient_fill(lad_df, palette=SIM_PALETTE, extra={"border-left": GROUP_BORDER} if c == pos_cols[0] else None),
       ) for c in pos_cols},
}

```

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Summary

```{python}
#| echo: false
table_card(
    df, style={"text-align": "left"}, class_="sim-tbl",
    columns=sim_columns, column_groups=sim_column_groups,
    pagination=False, compact=True,
)
```

## Ladder Distribution

```{python}
#| echo: false
table_card(
    lad_df, style={"text-align": "left"}, class_="lad-tbl",
    columns=ladder_columns,
    pagination=False, compact=True,
)
```

## Finals Sims

```{python}
#| echo: false
finals_df = df[["Team"] + finals_cols]
table_card(
    finals_df, style={"text-align": "left"}, class_="sim-tbl",
    columns={
        "Team": Column(cell=team_cell(), style={"font-weight": "bold"}),
        **{c: Column(
               cell=blank_if_zero(digits=2, suffix="%"), align="center",
               style=gradient_fill(finals_df, palette=SIM_PALETTE),
           ) for c in finals_cols},
    },
    pagination=False, compact=True,
)
```

:::
